job
***


Description
===========

A job for training models.


Available Commands
==================

* change-compartment

* create

* create-job-artifact

* create-job-managed-compute-cluster-job-infrastructure-configuration-
  details

* delete

* get

* get-artifact-content

* head-job-artifact

* list

* update

* update-job-managed-compute-cluster-job-infrastructure-configuration-
  details
